message:
fix: preserve pre-existing hooks when bd init sets core.hooksPath

When bd init installs hooks to .beads/hooks/ and sets a local
core.hooksPath, it shadows any global core.hooksPath the user had
configured, silently disabling their global hooks. Copy non-beads
hooks from the previously effective hooks directory into the target
before the override takes effect.

Fixes #2729

Co-Authored-By: gzur <gzur@gzur.net>
